rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY E HELD PH.D. P.E. VS. 26 CALIFORNIA BAZAR INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Anthony Held'S Notice And Motion For Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 16, 2009, line 13, Plaintiff Anthony Held's Motion For Fees And Costs. MOTION FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $14,063.50 PLUS COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,129.65. INVESTIGATIVE FEES DISALLOWED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1033.5(b)(2) AND SUPPORTING EVIDENCE CONCLUSORY AND UNSUBSTANTIATED. EXPERT FEES AND TESTING DISALLOWED. BILLINGS FOR "RELATED CASE NOTICE" DISALLOWED BECAUSE THIS DEFENDANT NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THOSE FEES. FEES FOR CASE FILE PREPARATION, DISCOVERY AND PARALEGAL RATES APPROVED. ATTORNEY FEE BILLING RATES REDUCED TO REASONABLE AND PREVAILING RATES IN THIS LEGAL COMMUNITY OF $350-$400 PER HOUR FOR THIS SIMPLE AND ROUTINE MATTER. REASONABLE AND NECESSARY HOURS SPENT TO PROSECUTE THIS ACTION REDUCED TO 46 HOURS TIMES APPROVED BILLING RATES RESULTS IN LODESTAR AMOUNT OR $14,063.50. (THE COURT NOTES THAT THE MORE THAN $22,000 BILLED JUST FOR BRINGING THIS ATTORNEY FEES MOTION WAS PARTICULARLY UNREASONABLE.) =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CENTER FOR SELF IMPROVEMENT AND COMMUNITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 16, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANTS CENTER FOR SELF IMPROVEMENT AND COMMUNITY AND CHRISTOPHER MUHAMMAD'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. CLAIMS ARISING BEFORE MARCH 30, 2005 ARE BARRED BY THE 4-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE FACTS SHOWING DEFENDANT MUHAMMAD IS PROPERLY JOINED AS AN INDIVIDUAL OR THAT PIERCING THE CORPORATE VEIL IS APPROPRIATE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE A BREACH OF CONTRACT AS THE RENT PROVISION ALLOWS FOR AN OFFSET OF OPERATING EXPENSES AGAINST THE RENT AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE THESE EXPENSES FELL UNDER $2,000. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCANS FOR LIVABLE NEIGHBORHOODS, AN UNIN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Petitoners Memo Of Costs And To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 16, 2009, line 11, RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Strike Petitioners Memo Of Costs And To Tax Costs. MOTION GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PLAINTIFF IS THE PREVAILING PARTY. MOTION GRANTED AS TO COSTS RELATED TO THE DEPOSITION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,680.35 WHICH DEFENDANT SUFFICIENTLY DEMONSTRATES WAS NOT NECESSARY WITHIN THE MEANING OF CCP SECTION 1033.5(a)(3). MOTION GRANTED AS TO COSTS FOR THE BLOWUPS WHICH WERE NOT REASONABLY HELPFUL TO AID THE TRIER OF FACT IN THE AMOUNT OF $287.63 CCP SECTION 1033.5(a)(12). MOTION DENIED AS TO THE FILING AND MOTION FEE OF $40.00. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CENTER FOR SELF-IMPROVEMENT AND COMMUNITY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 16, 2009, line 12, Defendants Demurrer To Plaintiff's Unlawful Detainer. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE 30 DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT DOES NOT STATE THAT DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SATISFY ITS RENTAL OBLIGATION BY NOT PAYING RENT AND NOT INCURRING OPERATING EXPENSES UNDER $2,000 EACH MONTH. ALTHOUGH THE TYPE OF INSURANCE REQUIRED BY PLAINTIFF IS LISTED IN THE LEASE, THE 30 DAY NOTICE TO PERFORM COVENANT OR QUIT DOES NOT SPECIFY WHAT PERIOD OF INSURANCE COVERAGE IT MUST PRODUCE TO PLAINTIFF. =(302/CWW)
